title: Risk and Return
description: Master the fundamental relationship between risk and return in finance. Learn to quantify risk using volatility, understand risk-adjusted returns, and apply key metrics like the Sharpe ratio.
learningObjectives: Define and measure investment risk using variance and standard deviation
Calculate and interpret the Sharpe ratio and other risk-adjusted metrics
Understand the risk-return tradeoff and efficient frontier
Distinguish between systematic and unsystematic risk
Apply risk metrics to compare investment opportunities
